name: Jalinan Terlarang
overview: Syafa has always strived to fulfill every role in her family-devoted wife, caring daughter, obedient daughter-in-law, and protective sister. After a failed attempt at IVF, she decides to adopt the baby of her younger brother's girlfriend, hoping to mend her grief and strengthen her family ties. However, the presence of this woman in their home slowly disturbs Syafa's marriage, triggering tension and suspicion. As emotions spiral, buried truths come to light, revealing a dark secret that threatens to destroy the family bonds Syafa has tried so hard to protect.

trailers.title: Trailer Resmi | Jalinan Terlarang | Marshanda, Dimas Anggara, Maria Theodore, Kiesha Alvaro
